title: Bridge
content:
# Bridge


## Properties

- **cluster_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Cluster.
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Bridge (Connection) was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **enabled** (`boolean`): If true, Bridge (Connection) `status` is set to `running` and will process I/O's. If false, Bridge (Connection) `status` is set to `stopped` but remains in Node on the Edge System.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Bridge (Connection).
- **node_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Node in the Cluster hosting the Bridge (Connection).
- **payload** (`object`): 
- **status** (`object`): Realtime information about the Workload as seen from the Cloud.
- **title** (`string`): Display name (`title`) of the Bridge (Connection).
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Bridge (Connection) keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **workload_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Workload that the Bridge (Connection) App is deployed as to the Cluster.
- **app_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the App. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
- **app_version** (`string`): App version
summary: Object with properties: cluster_name, created, enabled, name, node_name

created.description: UTC time when the Bridge (Connection) was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

enabled.description: If true, Bridge (Connection) `status` is set to `running` and will process I/O's. If false, Bridge (Connection) `status` is set to `stopped` but remains in Node on the Edge System.

node_name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Node in the Cluster hosting the Bridge (Connection).

status.description: Realtime information about the Workload as seen from the Cloud.

last_seen.description: UTC time when the Workload was last seen by the Cloud, formatted in RFC 3339.

warnings.description: All warnings received for any Workload operations.

updated.description: UTC time when any Bridge (Connection) keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

workload_name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Workload that the Bridge (Connection) App is deployed as to the Cluster.

app_name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the App. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
